description: This file contains utility functions, mixins, and functions used within the Bootstrap framework for evaluating source code, handling colors, maps, and string manipulations. It includes functions for color contrast, luminance, map operations, and string replacements, primarily supporting styling and theming features.

methods.name: to-rgb
methods.description: Converts a color value to its RGB components as a list.

methods.name: rgba-css-var
methods.description: Generates an RGBA CSS variable string based on identifier and target.

methods.name: map-loop
methods.description: Iterates over a map, applying a function to each key-value pair, returning a new map.

methods.name: varify
methods.description: Generates a list of CSS variable references from a list of entries.

methods.name: negativify-map
methods.description: Converts a map of numeric values into its negative variant with keys prefixed by 'n'.

methods.name: map-get-multiple
methods.description: Retrieves multiple key-value pairs from a map based on a list of keys.

methods.name: map-merge-multiple
methods.description: Merges multiple maps into a single map.

methods.name: str-replace
methods.description: Replaces all occurrences of a substring within a string with a new string.

methods.name: escape-svg
methods.description: Escapes characters in an SVG string for safe embedding, especially data URIs.

methods.name: color-contrast
methods.description: Determines the best contrasting color for a given background based on WCAG contrast ratios.

methods.name: contrast-ratio
methods.description: Calculates the contrast ratio between two colors.

methods.name: luminance
methods.description: Calculates the relative luminance of a color for contrast purposes.

methods.name: opaque
methods.description: Returns an opaque version of a color over a background.

methods.name: tint-color
methods.description: Tints a color by mixing it with white.

methods.name: shade-color
methods.description: Shades a color by mixing it with black.

methods.name: shift-color
methods.description: Shades or tints a color depending on the weight.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds two values, returning a calc expression if necessary.

methods.name: subtract
methods.description: Subtracts two values, returning a calc expression if necessary.

methods.name: divide
methods.description: Divides two numbers with specified precision, handling units.
